task.title: Logging Out
task.shortdesc: This section describes about how to log out from the Nuance CDE.

copyright.copyrholder: © 2026. Nuance Communications. Inc.® . Proprietary and Confidential. All rights reserved.

step.cmd: From the top right, navigate to the icon with your name, and then click the Logout link.
step.info:
Logout Link
You have successfully logged out message is displayed and you are logged out from the application. Logout Screen
To return to the login screen, click the Return to the login page link. If your facility is using single sign-on then after clicking the Return to the login page link, the Triage Worklist screen is displayed.
